---
title: "nitrix.sparse"
generated: true
signature-hash: 8f9239f94858a980
description: "nitrix.sparse -- geometry-aware sparse formats."
listing:
  id: nitrix-sparse-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-sparse/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.sparse`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
nitrix.sparse -- geometry-aware sparse formats.

ELL is the primary format. The submodule `nitrix.sparse.ell` exports
the construction / gather / scatter / pad primitives; the section
implementation lives in `nitrix.sparse.ell_sectioned` (Phase 2.A.8).

No `jax.experimental.sparse` dependency anywhere.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-sparse-symbols}
:::
